title: Update Congress UI for ABORT/REFRAME states

log.context: Update Congress UI for ABORT/REFRAME states

Committed. Here's a summary of what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**ABORT handling (detected by `verdict.startsWith("ABORTED by Ibrahim:")`)**:

- **CSS**: New `.status-dot.aborted` (orange `#fb923c`), `.verdict-card.aborted` (orange border/heading/left-bar), `.abort-reason-box` (styled orange container for the reason text)
- **Sidebar session list**: Aborted sessions get the orange status dot with `title="aborted"` instead of the green "done" dot
